title: Starships of the Galaxy
content:

'''''Starships of the Galaxy''''' is a sourcebook for the [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game Revised Core Rulebook|Star Wars Roleplaying Game]] published by [[Wizards of the Coast]] and [[LucasBooks]] in [[December]] [[2001]]. This book is out of print.

The book covers information on [[Starship/Legends|starship]] design, [[Space station/Legends|space station]] design, and [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyards]]. It contains new rules for starships and starship-using characters, adventures, and stats and information on a number of [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]], [[Transport/Legends|space transports]], [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]], and [[Space station/Legends|space stations]]. It also covers special rules for starships, starfighters, and space stations of the ''Star Wars'' roleplaying game. A few pages show how to create and supply ships and space stations for the game. Game players can use this guide as a source for the game or on building ships for their characters' personal use.

This book was never updated for the revised rules presented in the ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game Revised Core Rulebook]]'', but it is simple to convert this book's stats to the new system.

An [[Starships of the Galaxy (Saga Edition)|updated edition]] was released in [[2007]].
